name: claude-hunterkit
description: 170 offensive security skills — web, API, AI, network, cloud, recon, auth. Bug bounty, red team, pentest. Recon-first conditional agent launch pipeline.
author: claude-hunterKit
short_description: The largest open-source offensive security skill library. 170 skills, 1,770+ payload files, recon-first pipeline with conditional agent launch.

skills.description: Full bug bounty pipeline: recon → learn → hunt → validate → report

router.description: Routes hunting tasks to the correct claude-hunterKit skill

install_instructions.claude_code: claude mcp add claude-hunterkit npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.codex_cli: codex mcp add claude-hunterkit -- npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.gemini_cli: gemini mcp add claude-hunterkit npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.cursor: Add to cursor MCP config: npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.copilot: copilot mcp add --name claude-hunterkit -- npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
